name: Judy's Jalapeno Jam
recipeIngredient: 4 or more jalapeno peppers, seeded and chopped
6 drops green food coloring, as desired
recipeInstructions:
Sterilize jars by boiling them for 10 minutes. Heat lids in hot water until ready to use.
Combine peppers, juice, and vinegar in a large saucepan. In a separate bowl, mix the sugar with butter or margarine. Stir the sugar mixture into the saucepan contents. Add pectin, mixing well. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and skim any foam.
Pour food coloring into the pan and bring it back to a full rolling boil, stirring continuously. Fill jars leaving 1/8 inch (title) from the top. Wipe jar rims and threads, then cover with lids and secure tightly.
Invert jars for 5 minutes before turning them upright. After one hour, check seals. Alternatively, process jars in boiling water bath for 15 minutes without sterilizing them first.
